Class HumanGroup

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.SocialEntity
org.jscience.natural.biology.SocialCollective<Individual>
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology.Population<Individual>
org.jscience.social.psychology.social.Group
org.jscience.social.psychology.social.HumanGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named, Positioned<Place>, SimulationAgent
Direct Known Subclasses:
Tribe
public class HumanGroup extends Group
Represents a group of human individuals (Homo Sapiens).
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • HumanGroup

      public HumanGroup(Place formalTerritory)
      Initializes a new HumanGroup instance with a physical location.
      Parameters:
      formalTerritory - the physical place or territory associated with this group
      Throws:
